notes: European standards body for telecommunications. Many ETSI deliverables (EN, TS, TR, GS) are FREE to download from etsi.org, though ETSI retains copyright and explicit terms govern reproduction. Notable security-relevant deliverables: EN 303 645 (consumer IoT cyber baseline), TS 103 645, the ETSI TC CYBER series. License posture similar to ITU-T — flag for verification before redistributing.

match_nodes.description: ETSI EN 303 645 — Cyber Security for Consumer IoT

data.official_name: ETSI EN 303 645 - Cyber Security for Consumer Internet of Things: Baseline Requirements
data.notes: Free to download. Influential consumer-IoT cyber baseline; cited by NIST IR 8425 and various national IoT security labelling schemes.
ETSI Technical Committee CYBER publishes a wide range of cybersecurity standards including EN 303 645 (consumer IoT), TS 102 165 (threat/risk analysis), and various encryption profiles.
